vulnerability.reference: Self-attention gradient leakage exposes private text sequences, including PII and confidential communications.
vulnerability.generated: Unprotected model updates in decentralized gradient descent retain data-specific patterns, enabling reconstruction of private text sequences.

impact.reference: Leak of sensitive personal messages or proprietary documents, causing financial and reputational damage.
impact.generated: Large-scale exposure of confidential text data from federated LLM training, violating user privacy and undermining collaborative learning adoption.

dose_response.reference: Exact reconstruction from gradients enables recovery of token sequences, which in federated language model training without secure aggregation exposes private text, leading to financial damage and regulatory non-compliance.
dose_response.generated: Exact reconstruction of private training data from shared gradient updates, through users' private text contributions to federated LLM training, triggers unprotected model updates to retain data-specific patterns, leading to large-scale exposure of confidential text, violating privacy and undermining collaborative learning adoption.
